aiCollaboration.interpretation: Expert-level AI collaboration! You excel at structured planning (12 todo uses), orchestration (8 delegations), and verification. You're leveraging AI as a true force multiplier.
strengths: Strong structured planning - you break down tasks effectively
Advanced AI orchestration - you leverage multi-agent capabilities well
Rigorous verification - you validate AI outputs thoroughly
Parallel execution - you run multiple agents concurrently

contextEngineering.interpretation: Context Master! You understand the delicate art of context engineering - preserving, selecting, compressing, and isolating context effectively.

bestExample.content: Please check src/analyzer/dimensions/ai-collaboration.ts:45-120 for the existing scoring logic. I need to add a new metric for parallel workflow detection. The new metric should follow the same pattern as calculateOrchestrationScore at line 234.

tips: Your context engineering is excellent! Consider writing a CLAUDE.md guide for your team.

recommendations: Your session patterns indicate sustainable productivity

tips: You've mastered the core toolkit! Consider exploring MCP integrations for even more power.

aiControl.interpretation: You are an AI Master. You maintain strategic control over AI outputs, provide clear constraints, and verify critically. This is the hallmark of a professional AI-assisted developer.
signals: Consistently verifies AI output before accepting
Modifies AI suggestions to match project standards
Uses iterative refinement for complex tasks
strengths: Expert verification habits - you never blindly accept AI output
Clear constraint specification - AI understands exactly what you need
Strategic context control - you manage what AI knows effectively

skillResilience.interpretation: Resilient Skills! You maintain strong independent coding abilities while leveraging AI effectively. You can code without AI assistance when needed.
recommendations: Your skills are well-maintained! Consider mentoring others on AI-human collaboration balance.
